/title "Test Manual"

# Introduction

Welcome to the test manual. This document tests the manual mode output.

## Getting Started

Here's how to get started with the basics.

### Prerequisites

You'll need the following:

- Item one
- Item two
- Item three

## Core Rules

The core rules section covers the fundamental mechanics.

### Movement

Characters can move up to their speed each turn.

| Stat | Value |
|------|-------|
| Walk | 6" |
| Run  | 12" |

### Combat

Combat is resolved with opposed rolls.

> Strategy is key. Plan your moves carefully.
>
> **-- The Tactician's Guide**

## Advanced Topics

These topics build on the core rules.

### Terrain

Terrain affects movement and line of sight.

### Special Abilities

Some characters have unique abilities.

/large

| Ability | Effect |
|---------|--------|
| Shield  | +1 Defense |
| Rush    | +2 Movement |

/normal

## Reference Tables

Quick reference for common values.

| Dice | Average |
|------|---------|
| 1d6  | 3.5 |
| 2d6  | 7.0 |
| 3d6  | 10.5 |
